positive: Minimalist stylized scene of a wandering forest creature, highly detailed line art illustration, incorporating geometric shapes and nature elements. The creature should be abstract yet recognizable, like a wise owl or a mythical forest deer. Use a limited color palette of emerald green, sepia brown, and creamy ivory. Strong silhouette, high contrast black ink on a light background. Central composition suitable for screen printing on fabric. Vector art style, intricate detailing, crisp lines, tattoo flash aesthetic, deep focus, soft edge gradient background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, low detail, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limb, cropped, out of frame, jpeg artifacts
